name: Header cart button opens an empty cart drawer that can be closed
description: Verifies clicking the header's Sepet button opens the slide-in cart drawer with the empty-cart message and CTA, and that it closes again.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage (/) with no items in the cart
Click the 'Sepet' (cart) button in the header
A dialog panel slides in from the right showing the heading 'Sepetim' and the empty-state text 'Sepetiniz boş'
The empty cart panel shows a 'Hemen Tasarla' link/button
Click the close (X) button on the cart drawer
The cart drawer panel is no longer visible on screen
